title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Led the backend development of a medical Laboratary Information Management System (LIMS) using NestJS and Spring Boot. Implemented auth for user roles, async pipeline for uploads, automated PDF summary generation, integrated caching mechaism, refactored DTO and database queries, provided CI/CD workflows for faster deployments.

title: Technical Content Engineer
description: Author deeply technical articles on DevOps, Linux, and Java. Published 150+ articles for 12+ million readers on the platform worldwide. Conducted deep research on 2500+ DevOps and Linux topics for 50+ authors. Ranked top 5% of contributors.

title: Backend Engineer
description: Worked on the backend of a mobile-first U.S. based consultation platform. Engineered microservices, refactored database schemas, optimized queries, and wrote technical documentations.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Developed full-stack solutions, achieving Top Rated status and 4.75/5 rating across 12+ projects. Worked solo on a basketball sports management platform covering features including player/stats management, play-by-play tracking, video compression, highlights generation from events, and adaptive playback.
